MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-04-2006 IN 206, DEFENDANT TGEC COMMUNICATIONS CO., LLC MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND RELATED DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATES; COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT APPEARED TELEPHONICALLY -HEARING HELD. MOTION WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 12/18/06 IS CONTINUED TO 5/7/07 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. NO OPPOSITION. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERK: R. GOULDING; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, CSR # 3321 (206)
